## Branch Checklist

- [ ] This PR targets the correct base branch.
- [ ] Normal development targets `develop`.
- [ ] Only `release/*` or `hotfix/*` targets `main`.
- [ ] Public protected branches were not updated through rebase merge.

## Change Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix

## Compatibility And Verification

- [ ] Compatibility check considered.
- [ ] H5 behavior considered.
- [ ] WeChat Mini Program behavior considered.
- [ ] Other mini program platforms considered if affected.
- [ ] Visual or cross-platform layout changes include verification notes, screenshots, or runtime size/style results.

## Release Notes

- [ ] Breaking changes are documented in this PR and CHANGELOG if applicable.
- [ ] For release PRs, the tag version matches `src/uni_modules/lucky-ui/package.json`.
